taxonomy: Grisebachianthus lantanifolius belongs to the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Grisebachianthus, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is also known as the 'false lantana' due to its similarities with the lantana plant. Grisebachianthus lantanifolius is an herbaceous shrub with small white or yellow flowers, which are arranged in clusters or panicles. The plant's classification is further supported by its characteristics, such as its leaf shape and arrangement, which resemble those of the lantana plant.
